description.en: Place a bid on an active auction. Your bid must be higher than the current highest bid.
description.de: Ein Gebot auf eine aktive Auktion abgeben. Ihr Gebot muss höher sein als das aktuelle Höchstgebot.
description.es: Place a bid on an active auction. Your bid must be higher than the current highest bid.
description.fr: Place a bid on an active auction. Your bid must be higher than the current highest bid.
description.ro: Place a bid on an active auction. Your bid must be higher than the current highest bid.
description.it: Place a bid on an active auction. Your bid must be higher than the current highest bid.

description.en: The ID of the auction to bid on.
description.de: Die ID der Auktion, auf die geboten werden soll.
description.es: The ID of the auction to bid on.
description.fr: The ID of the auction to bid on.
description.ro: The ID of the auction to bid on.
description.it: The ID of the auction to bid on.

description.en: The token identifier of the NFT being auctioned.
description.es: The token identifier of the NFT being auctioned.
description.fr: The token identifier of the NFT being auctioned.
description.ro: The token identifier of the NFT being auctioned.
description.it: The token identifier of the NFT being auctioned.

description.en: The nonce of the NFT being auctioned.
description.es: The nonce of the NFT being auctioned.
description.fr: The nonce of the NFT being auctioned.
description.ro: The nonce of the NFT being auctioned.
description.it: The nonce of the NFT being auctioned.

description.en: Your bid amount in the accepted payment token.
description.de: Ihr Gebotsbetrag in dem akzeptierten Zahlungstoken.
description.es: Your bid amount in the accepted payment token.
description.fr: Your bid amount in the accepted payment token.
